messages.content: its gonna be a good season i can feel it
ur wall balls were on point 🤌
im gonna be so sore tmrw
ok wait what was ur fran time
seriously u gotta stop sleeping on urself
omg my watch band just snapped mid set
ya watch is fine just the band broke
ok good lol i thought u launched it across the gym 😂
get a silicone one they last way longer!!
new watch band came!! back in business 💪
hey can i ask you something kind of big
ok so dont freak out but i need your help with something for T
ok so im thinking valentines weekend. theres this cabin in hocking hills
and i found this spot on the hocking river where u can kayak and theres like this overlook after
stop im literally gonna cry at the gym rn 😭
so basically i need u to make sure he doesnt find out. like if he mentions valentines at crossfit just play dumb
been looking. found one i love but havent pulled the trigger yet
ok keep me posted on everything. im SO in 💪
team wod tmrw! ur with derek and rachel
u guys are gonna crush it 💪
ok so a coffee shop asked about my bread... is this crazy?
they want 6 loaves a week. 15 bucks each
idk tho like with on call and everything
yeah but i gotta figure out costs and if i can actually make 6 at a time
still. extra money is extra money 💰
true. im gonna run the numbers
keep me posted!! this is so cool
will do. dont tell anyone tho ok
cabin booked. kayaks booked. its happening
nervous. excited. trying not to think about it too much lol
ill show u next time im at the gym. its so pretty T 😭
as ready as im gonna be
ur gonna be GREAT. text me after ok??
heyyy i've been dying to know!! how did the cabin weekend go?? 😍 did everything go like we planned??
girl u have been putting in the WORK. u got this
get some sleep tonight. no 2am baking 😂
Melissa, thank you for signing up to bring your chili for the potluck. It is always a blessing to the group.
aww thank you pastor glenn! its my favorite thing to make for church stuff
The Wednesday group has really come together around these meals. It warms my heart to see.
right?? i love our group so much
See you tomorrow. Grace and peace.
Pastor Glenn, would you be open to preparing a blessing for a special occasion in February? Its for Trevor.
Melissa, I would be honored. I have been praying for you both. Can I call you this evening to discuss the details?
that would be great. after 7 works for me
thank you pastor glenn. that conversation meant so much
It is my joy, Melissa. I will have something beautiful prepared. Grace and peace.
quick update - feb 14-16 at hocking hills. the cabin is all booked
Noted. I will write the blessing with that setting in mind. What a beautiful choice.
Be at peace, Melissa. God has prepared this moment. I will be praying for you both all weekend. The blessing is ready.
hey do u think we should bring the cornhole set to the block party
ok cool ill grab it from the closet
the email said theyre blocking off oakland park between indianola and high
oh nice thats a lot of space
i know i love block party season
idk ill figure out the food stuff this week
ok so for saturday im gonna make a few sourdough loaves and bring apple cider
ur sourdough is gonna be gone in like 5 min
im serious people r gonna lose it
lol ok well can u grab a gallon of apple cider from kroger
yeah when do u need it
the good kind from the refrigerated section not the shelf stable stuff
remember that fintech startup i interviewed with
they want me for a ux redesign. 3 month contract
gonna be tight timeline but the work looks fun
u always do ur best work under pressure
lol thats one way to put it
siennas doing friendsgiving at her place nov 22 were invited
ill make sourdough rolls and pie
pie is done lets head to siennas in like 20
lol my garmin band snapped during deadlifts
oh no 😩 is the watch ok
ya watch is fine just the band broke
what do u want for dinner
yeah came on when i started it this morning
ok solid is better than flashing
i googled it. might be an evap code
something with the fuel vapor system. could just be a loose gas cap
or it could be a sensor idk
yeah gonna call when they open
the cold snap prob set it off
thats literally what the forum said lol
that helps so much this month
fr. still got january left too so we're set for a bit
when does the contract actually end
end of january. they might extend tho
nvm it was the gas cap lol
does it match ur old one
ya got the same black one
the sink is basically not draining anymore lol
i ran the water for like 2 min and its just sitting there
i just submitted a maintenance request
u think bryce will actually send someone 😩
i mean he has to its literally not draining
ive been using the bathroom sink for dishes lol
bryce said plumber is coming thursday
do we gotta be home for that
yeah 10 to 12. ill be at work
hes doing something under the sink with a snake thing
ok hes done. drain works now 🙌
yay!! what was wrong with it
idk some grease buildup? he snaked it out
nice at least it was a quick fix
hey can we sit down and talk about the lease this weekend? i have some ideas
the rent increase. ive been looking into some stuff
oh nice. like what kind of stuff
just some research on what our options are. i dont think we have to just accept it
for real?? i kinda assumed we were stuck
nope. theres actually a lot we can push back on
i put together a whole thing. want to walk you through it
damn babe u went full devops on bryce 😂
saturday afternoon work? i should be done with my portfolio stuff by like 2
ok im excited to see what u got. honestly been stressing about the rent thing 😩
me too. thats why i wanted to be ready before we talked about it
how was the portfolio stuff today
its only been like 3 weeks babe
sent out like 8 proposals this week and nothing
something will come. ur portfolio is really good
that fintrack work was solid. anyone would be lucky to hire u
i just hate the waiting part
i know im late on rent this month, client still hasnt paid 😩
its ok babe i moved some from savings to cover
babe no thats our house savings
its temporary. thats what savings is for
ill put it back as soon as the invoice clears
any update on the rent increase stuff
did that tenant org ever get back to u
yeah they were actually really helpful. ill show u when its all together
client finally paid 🙏 venmoing u now
500 right now and then ill send more for feb rent end of next week
lol perfect timing. i literally just moved the 500 back to ally
well now u can just keep the venmo in checking
small agency in german village. brand identity package
already started lol. due in 3 weeks
its not 3500 but ill take it
true. venmoing u 800 for rent this week
so remember that agency from german village
they want to talk about a 6 month contract 👀
if this works out its like actual steady income
not counting chickens but im feeling good about it
u better wear the blue shirt
hey babe can we sit down this weekend and go through everything? like all the accounts and the savings and what were spending. i want to make a plan with the rent going up
GREAT kickoff everyone!! 🔥🔥 this season is gonna be EPIC
love the energy!! see u all next saturday 💪
anyone else almost die during that amrap
melissa got a fran pr too just saying 🤌
heavy lifts today 🏋️ nice work everyone
TEAM WOD was chaos and i loved it 🔥
u two were so in sync
trust ur training. see u at 10
melissa ur snatch at the end was INSANE
when do we find out standings
yall did everyone see the potluck email
the one with the cornbread on top?? 🔥
I was planning to make my apple pie.
Ruth your pies are the best!
wait since when do u make mac and cheese
babe i make great mac and cheese 😤
I will bring a salad and some of the rolls from the bakery on High Street. Thank you all for signing up.
Diane and I will bring a fruit salad.
perfect!! this is gonna be so good
hey everyone! so i was thinking... would anyone be up for thanksgiving at our place this year? i wanna do a big dinner
That sounds lovely Melissa! Count me in.
What a wonderful idea. I would be happy to attend.
she already bought a dutch oven lol were def doing this
I'd love to! How many are you thinking?
like 8ish? apartment isnt huge but we can make it work
Diane and I would be honored to come. Thank you for the invitation.
yay! so glad everyone can make it
ok side dish planning! im doing turkey stuffing mashed potatoes and gravy. who wants to bring what?
I'll bring my green bean casserole.
I will bring my sweet potato casserole. Thank you for hosting, Melissa.
everyone loves your sweet potato casserole pastor glenn
Diane will make her cornbread. She has already started talking about it.
this is gonna be so good 😍
ok thanksgiving logistics! dinner at 4. come anytime after 2 if u wanna hang while i cook
742 oakland park ave apt 4b for anyone who needs it
We will be there around 3. Can I help set the table?
ruth you are an angel yes please
I will arrive around 3:30. The casserole needs about 30 minutes in the oven. Looking forward to it.
yall. what if we did a camping trip end of march?? mohican state park
i went there in college its so pretty
mohican sounds awesome lets do it
ok so ive been looking at mohican its actually sick
theres a gorge trail and everything
right?? we should do thr gorge saturday
yes fire ring at every site
Count me in. What gear should I bring? It has been a few years since I have been camping.
pastor glenn!! dont worry ill make a gear list
I think I'll pass on this one. My knees and sleeping on the ground don't mix! Have a wonderful time.
totally understand ruth! well bring u back a pinecone
ok how many cars we taking
gear fits in teh f150 bed
update!! campsite is booked 🎉 mohican march 28-30
ok food assignments. im doing campfire chili sat night adn breakfast burritos sunday morning
I will bring coffee and a camp percolator. Also fruit and granola bars for the mornings.
we better actually clear the dungeon this time
we wouldve if someone didnt walk off the cliff
im down. eating leftovers all day
give me like an hour lol
we need a better strat for that raid 😂
except i need a pie dish lol mine cracked
Hey! Doing a Friendsgiving at my place Nov 22. You and Trevor in?
were totally in! ill bring sourdough rolls and a pie
Your sourdough is literally the best 😍
6pm, everyone brings a dish. I'm handling the turkey and mac n cheese
Guest list so far: us, Jay and Kim, Deshawn, maybe Preethi. Jay's gf is vegan btw
noted. apple pie should be fine right
Definitely! Can never go wrong with apple
Wine or cider would be perfect! Deshawn's on beer duty
Oh no! Check CatalogCat, that's where I got all my bakeware
Hey! Reminder for Saturday - 6pm, my place. 2847 Summit St if you need it
got it! baking the pie tomorrow night
Can't wait, it's going to be so fun
is it dressy or like sweats vibes
Super casual. Deshawn texted he's wearing a Bengals jersey so 😂
Cannot wait to try it! See you guys soon 🥧
that was so fun thank u for hosting!!
So glad you guys came! The sourdough rolls were incredible
Hey! Saw this on LinkedIn and thought of you 👏
CloudBridge Systems, Senior DevOps Engineer. Remote-friendly, Columbus based. The Terraform + AWS stack is literally your resume
haha thanks! ill check it out
You should! I know a couple people over there if you ever want an intro
things are kinda hectic at forge rn tho with the migration
Fair! Just didn't want you to miss it. Posting's only been up like 3 days
Seriously though you'd crush it at senior level. Have you thought about it?
ive thought about it a little honestly
just not sure the timing is right rn
I get it. But don't wait too long, the market is really good right now. Companies are actually paying for infrastructure people
I didn't feel ready when I applied for mine at Elevate either. Nobody ever does 😅
u were doing senior stuff way before the title tho
So are you! The Jenkins to GH Actions migration, the on-call rotations. That's all senior-level work
ill think about it for real tho
That's all I'm saying! And if you ever want to do a mock interview or need a reference, I'm here for it
btw i just had my 6-month review at elevate and they bumped me to 145 🎉 makes me think about how underpaid infra people are at most places. you should seriously look around mel
omg melissa jackson?? is this still ur number
lauren!! yes hi oh my gosh
we need to catch up its been forever!! when r u free
Hey! Saw your sourdough on insta, looks amazing
haha thanks its become a whole thing
We should grab drinks! I just moved to German Village
hey melissa hope ur doing well. saw this devops role and thought of u
thanks jay ill check it out
Merry Christmas sweetheart! Love you and Trevor. Hope to see you both at Easter this year!
Merry Christmas Aunt Carol! love you too
Hey this is Chris from 2A. Did you get a package for C. Bonner? Think it went to your door
oh yeah its here! ill leave it by your door
heads up the laundry room is flooded again
ugh thanks for the heads up
he said someone is coming tomorrow morning
anyone down for tacos after standup friday?
anyone going to the AWS summit in march
nice lmk if yall wanna link up there

hey can u pick up milk on ur way home
you surviving the on call week?
ping me if you need anything
Hi Melissa, just following up on the bathroom caulking. Let me know if it held up ok.
does anyone know what happened on oakland park last night? police were there for like an hour
i think it was a fender bender
yeah saw it too. nobody hurt
